---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 13"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: true
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

# FastAPI

Complete FastAPI tutorial:

- <https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/>
- <https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/first-steps/>
- <https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/path-params/>
- <https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/query-params/>
- <https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/body/>

# Exercises

1. Replace server component from labs 11-12 with FastAPI.
2. Rewrite clients in labs 11-12 so that they work with FastAPI server.
